subject: Sociology
title: The Network Society
description: A quick, practical guide to The Network Society.

hook.text: Manuel Castells said power no longer sits in buildings. It flows through networks — digital, financial, social.

buildup.text: The network society is organized around information technology networks that connect people, firms, and states.

discovery.text: Networks are flexible and fast. They outperform rigid hierarchies, reshaping how work, politics, and culture operate.

twist.text: Being excluded from networks is the new inequality. Those outside the network are invisible to the global system.

climax.text: Power in the network society belongs to those who control flows of information, capital, and connection.

quiz.question: What is Castells' network society?
options: Society organized around information technology networks
